# FocusTrap

A utility component that traps keyboard focus within a container, preventing focus from escaping to elements outside. Essential for accessible modals, dialogs, and overlays.

## Import

```jsx
import { FocusTrap } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the focus trap is disabled. |
| `autoFocus` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to auto-focus the first focusable element when the trap activates. |
| `restoreFocus` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to restore focus to the previously focused element when the trap deactivates. |

## Usage

### Basic Focus Trap

```jsx
<FocusTrap>
  <Box p="4" border="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200" borderRadius="md">
    <Input placeholder="First field" />
    <Input placeholder="Second field" mt="2" />
    <Button mt="2">Submit</Button>
  </Box>
</FocusTrap>
```

### Disabled Focus Trap

```jsx
<FocusTrap disabled={!isModalOpen}>
  <Box>
    <Input placeholder="Focusable input" />
    <Button>Action</Button>
  </Box>
</FocusTrap>
```

### Without Auto Focus

```jsx
<FocusTrap autoFocus={false}>
  <Box p="4">
    <Input placeholder="Not auto-focused" />
    <Button>Submit</Button>
  </Box>
</FocusTrap>
```
